message:
feat(runtime): add advanced resize coalescing with telemetry integration

Further resize coalescer enhancements:
- Add telemetry hooks for resize event tracking
- Implement adaptive debounce timing based on resize patterns
- Add resize storm detection heuristics
- Wire up telemetry in program runtime

These improvements help diagnose and tune resize behavior in
real-world usage scenarios.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
